summary: Full PWA polish + camera-direct upload tested end-to-end on https://roofing-crm-3.preview.emergentagent.com. PWA manifest, service worker, assets, registration, install button, camera buttons (Project Photos / Assessment Editor / Library / Vendors COI), and regression flows all PASS. Zero blocking issues.
tests_executed: PWA manifest: GET /manifest.json -> 200 application/json; name='SealTech CRM', short_name='SealTech', theme_color=#062B67, background_color=#062B67, display=standalone, exactly 3 icons (192/512/maskable-512) -- PASS
PWA index.html: served HTML contains <link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json">, <meta name="theme-color" content="#062B67">, <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png"> -- PASS

PWA SW source: contains SHELL_URLS=['/', '/index.html', '/manifest.json', '/sealtech-logo.png']; network-first for /api/* with offline JSON fallback (status 503 'Offline...'); cache-first for /static/* and hashed assets via isStaticAsset(); skipWaiting+clients.claim wired -- PASS
PWA SW registration: after login, navigator.serviceWorker.controller.scriptURL === 'https://roofing-crm-3.preview.emergentagent.com/sw.js' AND registration.active.scriptURL matches; scope='/' -- PASS

PWA install button: [data-testid='pwa-install-btn'] is HIDDEN by default (not visible until beforeinstallprompt). Dispatching window CustomEvent('pwa:install-available') with synthetic __deferredInstallPrompt makes the button mount and become visible -- PASS
Camera Project Photos (/deals/{id}): [data-testid='camera-photo-btn'] renders; nested input -> type=file, accept=image/*, capture=environment, multiple=true -- PASS

Camera Assessment Editor (Step 3 -> 'Change' on Aerial opens photo-picker-modal): [data-testid='camera-assessment-photo-btn'] renders inside [data-testid='photo-picker-modal']; nested input -> type=file, accept=image/*, capture=environment, multiple=true -- PASS
Camera Library upload modal: [data-testid='camera-library-btn'] renders; nested file input present -- PASS

Camera Vendor COI (vendor edit modal): [data-testid='vendor-camera-coi-btn'] renders inside [data-testid='vendor-coi-section']; nested input -> type=file, accept=image/*, capture=environment, multiple=true -- PASS

uploadCoi() source review: posts to /api/library with FormData fields category='Insurance', subcategory='COI', display_name, description, file -- matches existing library multipart endpoint (no new backend route needed). Source verified at /app/frontend/src/pages/Vendors.jsx:62-84.
Regression /assessments: 'Asset Score' column header visible; list loads -- PASS
Regression /calendar: page loads with cobalt blue rgb(29,78,216) present in DOM -- PASS
Regression /login + dashboard: login succeeds with admin@roofingcrm.com / admin123 and Command Center dashboard renders with KPI cards -- PASS
critical_code_review_comments: sw.js is small (2.8 KB), well-commented, and follows best-practice cache strategies: pre-cached shell, cache-first hashed/static, network-first /api with explicit offline JSON ({detail, offline:true, status 503}). VERSION constant is bumped manually -- consider auto-injecting build hash to avoid forgetting bumps on strategy changes.
pwa.js correctly skips SW registration on localhost dev (avoids stale-cache pain) and only registers on window 'load' event -- non-blocking, good.
controllerchange handler in pwa.js triggers a full page reload after promoteWaitingWorker so the new bundle is actually used -- correct.
CameraCaptureButton uses <label>+<input type='file' hidden> pattern which is the correct accessible way to trigger file capture; ref-based value reset ('') allows re-selecting the same photo. Good.
PWAControls hides the install button if matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)') is true OR navigator.standalone is true -- covers Android + iOS. Good.
uploadCoi() loops sequentially (await per file) -- fine for a few photos but could be parallelized with Promise.allSettled if users upload 10+ COIs at once. Not blocking.
Minor (informational): /sw.js Content-Type is 'application/javascript' (standard); some strict CSP setups prefer 'text/javascript' but browsers accept both for SW registration.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seed deal 350cedf9-6012-42bd-9e0b-90db4adb43df and seed assessment f96cf959-4e6b-4073-a21d-cb46ac71ad95 read-only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA infra (manifest, sw.js, registration, install hook) and all 4 camera-direct upload buttons are production-ready. Service worker registers on the preview URL via HTTPS. To re-verify the Assessment Editor camera button, navigate to /assessments/{id}, click Step 3 'Condition Findings' tab, then click [data-testid='pick-aerial'] to open the photo-picker-modal which contains camera-assessment-photo-btn. The Vendor camera COI lives inside the vendor edit modal opened by clicking a vendor row. Install button visibility test requires dispatching window CustomEvent('pwa:install-available') + setting window.__deferredInstallPrompt manually since real beforeinstallprompt is browser/heuristic-controlled.
